commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Codex app-server compaction through native thread compaction first, demotes context engines to post-native maintenance, and adds doctor/docs/tests for ignored Codex compaction overrides and Lossless migration.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high-confidence: current main calls an owning context engine's compaction path before Codex native compaction despite the documented Codex native-compaction contract. I did not run a live OAuth repro in this read-only review, but the after-fix logs support the original failure path.
